name: Over The Door Multi Function Basket and Hook Light Brown - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your home in order with the help of this Over-The-Door Multi Function Basket and Hook from Brightroom™. Made of metal, this multifunction basket features a rectangular tray to hold everyday items and boasts four hooks to hang towels, clothes, and more. Powder-coated in a light brown hue, this hook is also wall-mountable for easy installation.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
